name: Bly Wide Kids' Bookshelf White - Pillowfort™
description:
This simple and stylish Bly Wide Bookshelf from Pillowfort™ is a perfect storage solution for books and toys alike. Featuring a 40-inch width with two shelves perfect for organizing their book collection, this white and wooden two-tone Montessori-style bookshelf also boasts bottom storage bins that can be used to stash games, stuffed animals and other small items. Perfect for keeping your kid's stuff neatly arranged and off the floor, this wide bookshelf still allows for easy access to their favorite books and toys. Plus, it coordinates with a variety of other shelves, storage bins, desks and more to create a pretty and polished look in their bedroom or playroom.

Overall Width: 40 inches
Overall Height: 38 inches
Overall Depth: 14 inches
Upper Shelf Depth: 8.4 inches
Middle Shelf Depth: 10.2 inches
Box Height: 13.75 inches
Box Width: 18.4 inches
